problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Quantum annealing for optimization problems is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
